chunks.text: ORDER SHLLT IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA CPNoD-199 0[ 2015- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HONBLE JUDGE OF HEARING For orders on office objection `A' For Hearing of main case 06.12.2017. Mr. Ameer Ahmed Narejo, State Counsel None present 10r Inc petitioners It appears that this petition was filed on 02O7 2015 and thereafter the petitioners have not pursued the matter diligently which shows that after filing this petition the petitioners have lost their interest therefore the same is dismissed for non prosecution - Judge Judge
